name: Arifur Rahman
bio: Childhood friend from Motijheel Government Boys' High School. We both share a passion for old Dhaka Biriyani and photography.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Brilliant software engineer and batchmate from BAUST. We often collaborate on open-source AI projects and discuss machine learning.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: Neighbor from Satkhira. A great cricketer and the person I call whenever I need a reminder of home and local updates.

name: Farhana Ahmed
bio: My cousin who works as a graphic designer in Chittagong. She loves traditional Nakshi Kantha designs and modern digital art.

name: Kazi Mehedi
bio: Senior researcher focused on computer vision. Currently helping me refine the leaf disease detection model for my latest paper.

name: Sultana Razia
bio: Instructional designer at our Ed-Tech firm. We usually meet for tea at TSC to discuss curriculum development and student engagement.

name: Imtiaz Shuvro
bio: ICPC teammate and C++ wizard. We’ve spent countless nights solving problems on Codeforces and eating late-night snacks.

name: Zarin Tasnim
bio: Fellow coordinator at Youth Upskill Network. Very active in community service and organizing leadership workshops across Dhaka.

name: Rakibul Islam
bio: Expert UI designer I met on Fiverr. We often trade tips on Figma layouts and minimalistic design trends for portfolio sites.

name: Sadia Afrin
bio: A core member of the BAUST Mathematics Club. Her dedication to organizing the recent Olympiad was truly inspiring.

name: Mahmudul Hasan
bio: Met during a tech conference in Rajshahi. He's a Laravel expert who knows the best spots for mangoes in the city.

name: Lutfun Nahar
bio: My elder sister who is a resident doctor in Dhaka. Always checking up on my health and diet during busy coding weeks.
